rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in component type scopes for port-based assumptions and guarantees
Use `assume` and `guarantee` statements with valid expression syntax
generic_rules: Generate AGREE contracts using visible AADL features and helper declarations
Write deterministic output dependency guarantees relating visible inputs to outputs
Use AGREE logical operators and temporal recurrence for stateful equations
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`
Component type contracts should not reference implementation-only subcomponent paths
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL property names as AGREE variables without explicit typed ports or constants
Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing parameters
Model fusion and component implementation binding details
